Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Plainitff Cross Defendant Cintas San Franciscos Further Responses To Plaintiff Special Interrogatories Set One And Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of 5000 Memorandum Of Points And Authoritiies Declaration Of Shawn Jefts Purposed Order
Off Calendar Feb-09-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance, The Court adopted it's tentative ruling;
DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HEALTH CARE AND REHAB, INC.'s Motion For Order Compelling Plainitff Cross Defendant Cintas San Franciscos Further Responses To Plaintiff Special Interrogatories Set One And Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of $5000.00, IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR. The moving papers were served by hand on January 23, less than the required 16 court days before the hearing. CCP 1005(b). The motion is to be re-noticed for hearing on a date that complies with the rules. Judge Pro tem: Roger Mead ; Clerk: Johnny Sengmany; Not Reported.=302/jpt
